identificationModule.briefTitle: Mobile Health Intervention for Family Smoking Cessation in Romania
identificationModule.officialTitle: Mobile Health Intervention for Family Smoking Cessation in Romania

descriptionModule.briefSummary: The objectives of this study are to determine in a randomized controlled trial (RCT) whether a mobile health (mHealth) couples intervention shows promise in increasing smoking cessation among pregnant couples who smoke and to build mHealth research capacity in Romania. The intervention will be novel in its use of the unique functionality of smartphones, its emphasis on the dyadic efficacy for smoking cessation, and the focus on pregnant couples. Our aims are to (1) Test the implementation feasibility, acceptability, and initial efficacy of a culturally-adapted mHealth smoking cessation intervention among couples during pregnancy and postpartum in Romania. (2) Develop mHealth research capacity by enhancing individual and institutional research capabilities in Romania and expanding the existing international research network.

armGroups.label: App-only
armGroups.description: The intervention will consist of participants will only use a smoking cessation app

armGroups.label: Telemedicine counseling only
armGroups.description: The intervention will consist of participants will only use telemedicine counseling
interventionNames: Behavioral: Smoke Free Together - Telemedicine counseling only

armGroups.label: App + telemedicine counseling
armGroups.description: The intervention will consist of participants will only use a smoking cessation app + telemedicine counseling
interventionNames: Behavioral: Smoke Free Together - app + telemedicine

armGroups.label: Usual Care
armGroups.description: The participants will continue with usual care

interventions.name: Smoke Free Together - App-only
interventions.description: Pregnant smokers and their life partners will use a smoking cessation app.

interventions.name: Smoke Free Together - Telemedicine counseling only
interventions.description: Pregnant smokers and their life partners will use telemedicine, real time video counseling on smoking cessation

interventions.name: Smoke Free Together - app + telemedicine
interventions.description: Pregnant smokers and their life partners will use telemedicine and an app for smoking cessation

primaryOutcomes.measure: Percentage of women in each arm who stopped smoking, and who relapsed smoking postpartum
primaryOutcomes.description: The primary outcomes are maternal pregnancy smoking cessation and postnatal relapse. Maternal smoking status will be biochemically verified at the final follow-up based on salivary cotinine obtained by mail.
primaryOutcomes.timeFrame: Change from smoking at baseline to quitting assessed at 3 months after the intervention is completed

eligibilityModule.eligibilityCriteria:
Inclusion Criteria:

* pregnant smokers in the 2nd or 3rd pregnancy trimester and their partners.
* 18 years or older
* married or in a stable relationship
* owns and uses an Android smartphone with broadband internet connection
* willing to have the partner contacted for participation.

Exclusion Criteria:

\-
